'''R'vanna''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] from somewhere in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], he was the leader of the [[Ryn City]] refugee group. In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], he served as [[Romany]]'s lieutenant in [[Settlement 32]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
